title: List of Medical Devices - Notification of Shortages - Canada.ca
content:
## List of Medical Devices - Notification of Shortages
- List of specified medical devices
- List of shortages and discontinuations
- Report the end of a shortage
- Report a discontinuation
Manufacturers and importers must report shortages and discontinuations of medical devices (or their components, accessories or parts) that will lead to a shortage. They must report medical devices that are on the following list.
Date issued: 2026-05-06
Supersedes: 2026-01-13
Access archived versions of this list .

## Category / name of the device
- Absorbable mechanical hemostatic sponges
- Anesthesia delivery devices
- Arterial blood gas devices
- Balloon dilatation catheters
- Capsular tension rings
- Chest drainage systems
- Control syringes with Luer lock tip
- Ear ventilation tubes (tympanostomy tubes)
- External drainage systems
- Intravascular shunts
- Medical gloves (nitrile)
- N95 respirators for medical use
- Neurological sponges
- Oxygen delivery devices
- Peripherally inserted central catheters (PICCs)
- Urine/Urinary drainage systems
- Ventilators (including bi-level positive airway pressure or BiPAP machines)
- Ventilators (including continuous positive airway pressure or CPAP machines)
- Vital signs monitors
